# Alice Chen

Senior Backend Engineer at the company since 2019.

## Background

Alice specializes in distributed systems and API design. She leads the backend team on Project Alpha and mentors junior engineers including Bob Martinez.

## Skills

- Rust, Go, Python
- PostgreSQL, Redis
- Kubernetes, Docker
- gRPC, REST APIs

## Current Work

Currently leading the API Gateway initiative as part of Project Alpha. Working closely with Carol Davis on the frontend integration.

## Notes

Alice is known for her thorough code reviews and documentation practices. She authored the Microservices Architecture concept document.
